Determines bonus to constitution related rolls

Rule: Survive for minutes equal to 1 + CON mod (minimum 30 seconds), then survives for rounds equal to CON mod. Next turn drops to 0 HP and is dying
Can go without enough food for days equal to 3 + CON mod. Each day past limit gain 1 level of exhaustion
CON mod added to HP at each level
CON mod added to each hit dice used during short rest

Endures a disease, poison, or other hazard that saps vitality

Rule: DC equal to greater of 10 or ½ of damage taken while concentrating on a spell
DC 15 or gain 1 level of exhaustion

Very rarely used, but can be used to push yourself beyond normal limits
Quaff an entire stein of ale in one go
